main_finding: Best local baseline after XGBoost LightGBM CatBoost and engineered features.
interpretation: Default accuracy is 0.8689 and default F1 is 0.7128; still no clean 0.90 result.

main_finding: Best DP result after full model x clip x noise grid.

main_finding: Extreme model x clip x noise setting shows clear utility collapse.
interpretation: Worst grid result demonstrates that high noise and unsuitable clipping can severely damage F1.

main_finding: Strongest clean local non-DP reference found so far.
interpretation: Default threshold accuracy is 0.8708; threshold tuning improves F1 but no clean run reaches 0.90.

main_finding: Stronger non-DP MLP reference for F1 comparison.
interpretation: Use this as the F1 reference when checking whether DP noise hurts utility.

main_finding: The smallest epsilon in the sweep comes from the largest noise.

main_finding: Clipping norm mainly affects utility when other DP parameters are fixed.
interpretation: Select by F1-score because epsilon is unchanged under fixed sampling/noise.
